name: aetherbrowse
description: Full development and operations toolkit for the AetherBrowse governed AI browser

interface.shortDescription: Governed browser stack with Playwright worker, runtime server, and Electron shell.
interface.longDescription: Operate the AetherBrowse browser system through its governed runtime, Playwright execution worker, and Electron shell lanes for research, browsing, and browser-side operations.
defaultPrompt: Operate the AetherBrowse browser lane for a web task.
Start the AetherBrowse runtime and Playwright worker.
Inspect the governed browser stack and its logs.
